text: Use Aimparency aimgraphs as strategic cortex for external autonomous runtimes
description: Design Aimparency so external runtimes such as Conway automaton can use the aim graph as a strategic planning and hypothesis-management layer while keeping their own execution/runtime machinery. This would let external agents pursue complex action plans through graph-backed memory, hypotheses, and reflections.

status.comment: Important long-term direction; integration boundary and ownership split still need design.
